description: CompositionBeige V-neck top made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, half buttoned placket on textured fabricFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this basic top with its plush fabric. The long sleeve adds an interesting dimension to this understated top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a tonal jacket.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
